articles.title: PRODUCT LEADERS
articles.summary: "Integrate AI everywhere!" Meanwhile, your team is just wondering which AI tools are worth the time and which are just noise...

articles.title: SUBSCRIPTIONS WILL SURVIVE IN EXACTLY TWO PLACES
ZILLOW'S CEO ON GROWING THE COMPANY DURING A HOUSING CRISIS (60 MINUTE PODCAST)
articles.summary: Zillow's CEO argues the company's future is transaction software and workflow that makes buying and selling easier, not just a listings app. In an AI-driven world, Zillow's advantage is execution and integration across agents and financing, while pushing for transparent, broadly marketed listings.

articles.title: I WAS TIRED OF JUGGLING MY AGENTS, SO I HIRED A MIDDLE MANAGER
articles.summary: Creating a manager agent to coordinate coding agents reduces multitasking overhead and accelerates development, but it requires giving up some direct control over code quality.

articles.title: TAKING STOCK OF THE SAASPOCALYPSE
articles.summary: The SaaS selloff reflects a belief that AI is breaking seat-based pricing and eroding point-solution moats. Software will keep growing, but value will shift to AI-native, outcome-driven layers that capture context and orchestrate work across systems.

articles.title: 16 PIECES OF DESIGN WISDOM
articles.summary: Great design comes from love, courage, and consistency more than tools or process. Ideas travel through polish and alignment, and designers thrive by treating feedback as dialogue while balancing reliability with bold experimentation.

articles.title: ENTERPRISE SAAS TRUISMS, REVISITED
articles.summary: AI is breaking classic SaaS assumptions by shifting moats from interfaces to context and compressing timelines for ROI and adoption. The winners will design for agents, governance, and organizational intelligence rather than traditional seat-based workflows.

articles.title: THE DEATH OF SPOTIFY: WHY STREAMING IS MINUTES AWAY FROM BEING OBSOLETE
articles.summary: Streaming commoditizes music, limits artist leverage, and rewards scale over loyalty. The future belongs to artists who own their audience and monetize deep fan relationships, not playlist placements.

articles.title: EVERY SAAS COMPANY IS BUILDING AI FEATURES RIGHT NOW
articles.summary: SaaS companies are chasing AI features while overlooking churn driven by human and competitive signals. Retention now depends on integrated risk monitoring, not just better product releases.

articles.title: THE NEXT GENERATION OF PRODUCTS WILL BE BUILT BY AI. PMS NEED TO GET READY
articles.summary: Don't get left behind as AI transforms the way companies build software. Grab this offer from General Assembly for 50% expert-led

articles.title: courses in AI product management. Claim your offer
THE FACEBOOK APP DIDN'T BECOME CLUTTERED BECAUSE NOBODY CARED
articles.summary: Facebook's clutter is a byproduct of metric incentives, not design neglect.

articles.title: HOW LONG UNTIL WE CALL AI AGENTS DATA PRODUCTS
articles.summary: A production AI agent is a data product with users, quality requirements, and a roadmap driven by real usage signals.
